facts.claim: 99 rules span 4 pathway generations: automatic v1/v3, homecare, manual (_REGRAS 20-criteria active + deprecated 27-criteria _ANTIGAS_REGRAS), and frontend interactive-bundle UI.
Core screening = major/minor criteria count mapped to VERMELHO/AMARELO/NEUTRO; >=4 variants disagree on AND-vs-OR, group boundaries (7/9/11 majors), strict-vs-inclusive comparisons.
SSC hour-1 bundle = 7-item checklist (3 'primeira_hora' + 4 'reavaliacao') with server timers (1h/2h/3h) and 3 auto-checks vs CPOE/ADEP.
Verbatim PT-BR decision text: volume dosing, lab reassessment, hemodynamic status (RASS-2), invasive-device mgmt, vasoactive escalation (NE 0.3/1.0 mcg/kg/min, shock index >0.7).
3 alert-catalog variants: v3 (20 criteria, RULE-SEPSE-058), variant B (27 criteria, 30ml/kg bolus, -059), variant A (11 criteria, Meropenem 1g+1500ml, -060, unclear wiring).

Histogram: status OK=73/DISCREPANCY=19/AMBIGUOUS=7 (n=99); type threshold=53/decision-tree=21/workflow=14; category care-pathway=29/alert-threshold=24/triage-eligibility=23/clinical-scoring=14; verdict NOT_APPLICABLE=34/VERIFIED=22/DISCREPANCY=27/UNVERIFIABLE=16.

RULE-SEPSE-001 (v1: maiores>=3 AND menores>=4->VERMELHO, UNVERIFIABLE) contradicts RULE-SEPSE-002 (v3: OR not AND, +criterion shift major/minor, DISCREPANCY-moderate) - direct cross-generation logic conflict.
RULE-SEPSE-014: v3 oliguria weight-parse strips the decimal separator ('70,5'kg->705kg), inflating weight ~10x, understating mL/kg/h; the only rule in-cluster rated clinical_impact=high.
RULE-SEPSE-043: manual-pathway hypotension checks PAD<90 in code vs PAD<60 in reference text (_REGRAS); DISCREPANCY, clinical_impact=high.
RULE-SEPSE-033 and RULE-SEPSE-016 both invert deterioration direction: consciousness criterion fires on IMPROVEMENT not worsening; GCS-delta detects an INCREASE not decrease. Both DISCREPANCY.

RULE-SEPSE-058: v3 alert-label catalog uses different numbering/thresholds than the v3 model predicates it displays (e.g. label plaquetopenia<150000 vs model <100000); DISCREPANCY - UI-vs-logic drift.
RULE-SEPSE-011 (PAS<90 OR PAD<60 OR PAM<65) verdict VERIFIED vs Sepsis-3/SSC MAP>=65 - clean reference rule to anchor v2 hypotension logic.

Dead-code field-name mismatches: RULE-SEPSE-079 dispatches on 'solicitacao_exame' vs plural bundle-item name (never fires); RULE-SEPSE-095 backend/frontend delay-flag mismatch (icon never renders); RULE-SEPSE-099 lookup key 'criterio8' (no underscore) drops delirium description.
Systemic unit drift: lactate as mmol/L (>=3,>=2.5) in some rules, mg/dl ('30 mg/dl','2.5 mg/dl') in others for the same concept; hemoglobin target written 'mg/dl' though physiologically g/dL.

Systemic window/dead-branch bugs: tempo_criacao()<=24h guards effectively always-true (timedelta.seconds not total_seconds); fromkeys() DRC/dementia exclusion gates always vacuous; RULE-SEPSE-003's menores==4 branch unreachable since criterio_11 (037) is hard-coded False.
34/99 rules (verify:false, NOT_APPLICABLE) are workflow/UI/RBAC scaffolding, not clinical logic. 2 rules dropped as misrouted; RULE-SEPSE-099 added via gap-remediation.

Feeds v2 domains: sepsis (primary), early-warning-scores (SIRS/qSOFA criteria reused cluster-wide), correlation (device-dwell/CLABSI flags), platform (checklist state-machine, RBAC), experience (protocol UI); workflow rules RULE-SEPSE-069..098 are retire-candidates for a rebuilt state machine.

PT-BR vocab to preserve verbatim: alert enum {VERMELHO,AMARELO,NEUTRO}; consciousness scale {acordado,sonolencia,agitacao,convulsao,reage_verbal,reage_tatil,coma}; pacote enum {primeira_hora,reavaliacao}; item names (solicitacao_exames, inicio_escalonamento_antimicrobiano, realizacao_expansao_volemica, status_hemodinamico, dispositivos_invasivos, drogas_vasoativas).

constraints.text: MUST NOT silently port the v1-vs-v3 AND/OR contradiction (RULE-SEPSE-001/002) or the alert-catalog-vs-model drift (RULE-SEPSE-058); requires explicit RATIFY of which generation to adopt.
MUST normalize lactate to mmol/L and hemoglobin to g/dL before use in v2 alert logic; legacy mixes units for the same analyte.
MUST correct the inverted-direction bugs (RULE-SEPSE-016, RULE-SEPSE-033) - candidates for ADOPT-CORRECTED not ADOPT.

open_questions: Which sepsis-alert generation (v1 AND, v3 OR, variants A/B/C) reflects intended design vs drift - needs clinical ratification.
Whether variant A (RULE-SEPSE-060) was ever live or is dead legacy code - wiring unclear in extracted partition.
